---
title: Getting Started
---

# 🚀 Getting Started

Your first-day checklist — knock these out before lunch:

- [ ] **Sign in to email** — [Open Outlook](https://outlook.office.com)
- [ ] **Set up MFA** — [Microsoft Authenticator setup](https://aka.ms/mfasetup)
- [ ] **Join the chat** — [Open Slack](https://slack.com/get-started)
- [ ] **Check your calendar** — [Open Google Calendar](https://calendar.google.com)

---

> 🎯 **Goal:** By end of day, you should be able to send an email,
> join a meeting, and message your team.
